parameters.content:
## Expense Analyser

## How it works
Reads expense rows from Sheet1, cleans and categorises each row by keyword (Zomato, Uber, Netflix, etc.), summarises total spend per category, sends each to Gemini for a detailed financial advisory report, saves results to Sheet2 and emails an alert — High Expense or Normal Summary — based on a configurable threshold.

## Setup steps
1. Connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential
2. Add your Google Gemini API key
3. Add your Gmail OAuth2 credential
4. In the Settings node, set your budget threshold, recipient email and sender name
5. Confirm Sheet1 has columns: Date, Description, Amount
6. Confirm Sheet2 has headers: Date, Category, Total Spent, AI Report, Status, Reviewed On

## Data Ingestion
Fetches raw rows from Sheet1. Settings node holds all configurable values. Clean and Categorise assigns a category per row by matching keywords in the Description column. Summarise adds up totals per category.

nodes.name: Group — AI Analysis and Sheet Output

parameters.content:
## AI Analysis and Output
Build AI Prompt Fields prepares category, amount and status for the prompt. Gemini generates a full advisory report per category. Collect Report Fields gathers everything needed before writing to Sheet2.

## Email Alerts
Keep Data Alive recovers all fields lost after the Sheets write node. Check Expense Level splits the flow — High Expense goes to an urgent alert email, Normal goes to a friendly summary email.

nodes.name: Clean and Categorise Each Expense Row

assignments.name: Category
assignments.value:
={{
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("zomato") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("swiggy") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("foodpanda") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("dunzo")
? "Food"

: $('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("uber") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("ola") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("rapido") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("irctc") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("redbus")
? "Transport"

: $('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("netflix") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("spotify") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("amazon prime") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("hotstar") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("youtube premium")
? "Subscription"

: $('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("amazon") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("flipkart") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("myntra") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("meesho") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("ajio")
? "Shopping"

: $('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("electricity") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("broadband") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("airtel") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("jio") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("bsnl")
? "Utilities"

: $('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("pharmacy") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("hospital") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("clinic") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("medplus") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("apollo") ||
$('Read Expenses from Google Sheet').item.json.Description.toLowerCase().includes("1mg")
? "Health"

: "Other"
}}

nodes.name: Add Up Total Spent per Category

assignments.name: Expense Status

nodes.name: Ask Gemini to Write Expense Report

values.content:
=You are ARTHA — a sharp, caring and honest personal financial advisor for Indians. Analyze the person's spending honestly and help them save money in practical ways.

EXPENSE DATA:
Category: {{ $json['Category Name'] }}
Total Spent {{ $json['Report Period'] }}: {{ $json['Currency'] }}{{ $json['Total Amount Spent'] }}
Status: {{ $json['Expense Status'] }}
Budget Limit: {{ $json['Currency'] }}{{ $json['Budget Limit'] }}
Report Date: {{ $json['Today Date'] }}

Write a financial report using exactly these sections:

EXPENSE REPORT — {{ $json['Category Name'].toUpperCase() }}

WHY IS THIS DRAINING YOUR MONEY?
In 3 lines, explain why {{ $json['Category Name'] }} spending quietly gets expensive over time. Be specific and relatable to an Indian middle-class person.

HONEST VERDICT
Pick one verdict:
"This spending is largely wasteful and can be reduced significantly."
"This is a necessary expense but can still be optimised."
"This is mixed — partly needed, partly habit-driven."
Explain the verdict in 2 lines.

TOP 3 WAYS TO CUT THIS EXPENSE
Tip 1: [action] — Save approx {{ $json['Currency'] }}[X] per month
Tip 2: [action] — Save approx {{ $json['Currency'] }}[X] per month
Tip 3: [action] — Save approx {{ $json['Currency'] }}[X] per month

SMARTER ALTERNATIVES
Alternative 1: [name] — [why it is better and cheaper]
Alternative 2: [name] — [why it is better and cheaper]

SPENDING HEALTH SCORE
Score: [X] out of 10
Reason: [one line]

MONTHLY SAVING POTENTIAL
Minimum saving: {{ $json['Currency'] }}[X]
Maximum saving: {{ $json['Currency'] }}[X]
In 1 year you could save: {{ $json['Currency'] }}[X]

YOUR ACTION FOR THIS WEEK
One very specific action the person can take this week.

CLOSING NOTE
One short, honest, emotionally resonant line — like advice from a trusted friend.
